A

add(int, E) - Method in class DoublingList
Inserts item at logical index pos, shifting existing elements right.
add(E) - Method in class DoublingList
Appends item to the end of the list (equivalent to add(size, item)).

D

DoublingList<E> - Class in Unnamed Package
DoublingList.java A generic doubly-linked list where the j-th node (0-indexed) has an array of length 2^j.
DoublingList() - Constructor for class DoublingList
Creates an empty doubling list.
DoublingListTest - Class in Unnamed Package
DoublingListTest.java JUnit 4 unit tests for DoublingList.
DoublingListTest() - Constructor for class DoublingListTest

iterator() - Method in class DoublingList
 

L

listIterator(int) - Method in class DoublingList
Returns a ListIterator positioned at logical index pos.

R

remove(int) - Method in class DoublingList
Removes and returns the element at logical index pos.

toStringInternal() - Method in class DoublingList
Returns the internal node structure as a string.
toStringInternal(ListIterator<E>) - Method in class DoublingList
Returns the internal node structure with a cursor marker "|" inserted immediately before the element at iter.nextIndex().
